name: Bad Luck Umbrella
description: Negates the next negative effect that would hit you from PvP, random events, or future hostile systems.

name: Longburn Spring
description: Your /dice uses roll twice for 5 minutes.

name: Chaos Flare
description: Triggers a random group event immediately, if the event system can legally spawn one right now.

name: Clockwork Croupier
description: Rolls for you every 5 seconds for 5 minutes, then posts a summary when finished.

name: Cleanse Salt
description: Removes all active negative effects and clears lockout.
